issue_summary: Added support for generalized Numerical Range faceting on any numeric (or date) field. Note: this required modifying ConvertedLegacyTest to deal with an expectation about how many fields a specific document has (there are more now because of a copyField i added to the schema)
javadoc_before:
/** * An enumeration of the legal values for FACET_DATE_OTHER... *
    *
  • before = the count of matches before the start date
    • *
  • after = the count of matches after the end date
    • *
  • between = the count of all matches between start and end
    • *
  • all = all of the above (default value)
    • *
  • none = no additional info requested
    • *
* @see #FACET_DATE_OTHER * @see #FACET_DATE_INCLUDE */
